steps.title: Identify the shared significance
steps.content: The student wants the significance of a similarity between two kits. CTAB 2X had high yield but poor purity, while Pplant had very low yield; both therefore fell short compared with Pbact.

steps.title: Rule out unsupported comparisons
steps.content: Choice A gives raw measurements without explaining significance. Choice C compares CTAB 2X with Pbact and falsely says they were equal in purity. Choice D wrongly says Pbact had an insufficient yield.

steps.title: State the common outcome
steps.content: The remaining choice explains the meaningful similarity: CTAB 2X and Pplant were both deemed less effective than Pbact because one lacked sufficient purity and the other lacked sufficient yield. The answer is B.
